name: urgent-issues
description: Mock flow for the 'Show me all the urgent issues right now.' suggestion chip. Two LLM calls per click: (1) initial user msg → issueTable tool call against ISS-101 + ISS-107 (the two Urgent rows in the seed); (2) post-tool LLM call → final assistant text. Tool-response fixture is listed FIRST so it wins the post-tool call (last msg role:tool with matching toolCallId); the chip fixture is SECOND and matches the initial user msg. NOTE: do NOT gate the user-message fixture on `hasToolResult: false` — aimock's `hasToolResult` checks whether ANY message in history is a tool result, not just the last one, so once an earlier flow (sprint-planning, etc.) has run on this thread the gate would never let urgent-issues fire again. Ordering is enough: the toolCallId fixture above requires the LAST message to be a tool result with the matching id, so it can't accidentally win on a fresh user message. Gated on the cowork agent's system marker so the BFF's auto-thread-title call can't accidentally match the userMessage substring.

response.content: Two urgent items right now: **ISS-101** (Safari payment integration, Alex, in progress) and **ISS-107** (Postgres pool exhaustion at peak, Jordan, in progress). Both are due this week — ISS-107 today. Want me to pull either into review or escalate?

match.userMessage: Show me all the urgent issues right now
